text: There wasn't really a story. It was just an afternoon at the park watching birds. I didn't feel moved. Life was boring. Just my dog walking at my feet. I wish I had some dreams. I remember this one time. I was in fourth grade. My teacher was mad. I thought she just didn't want me. Something had to get me out. I decided to read all day. I read books constantly. I read at school. My teacher fell asleep. I read my autobiography. I read the dictionary. I read the newspaper. I discovered a secret. An old guy lived on campus. I talked to him. He gave me my dream. Go into the woods. Find an old tree. You'll hear voices. Find this old lady. She helps. You win the world. I do this. It's my dream. I get a bird house. I hang it. I go to bed. I learn nothing. I wake up. You've won.
